description: Issue a signed attestation for a community member. Supports public and private (encrypted) visibility modes. Claim is capped at 4096 bytes (JSON-serialized) and 5 levels of nesting.

main.description: Create an attestation record certifying a member's role, status, or credentials. Private attestations encrypt the claim and store a commitment hash.

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: Missing required fields, invalid type, or claim exceeds depth/shape limits.

errors.name: NotMember
errors.description: Subject is not a member of this community.

communityDid.description: The community DID issuing the attestation.

subjectDid.description: The DID of the person being attested.

type.description: Attestation type: membership, role, or credential.

claim.description: Arbitrary claim data (role, position, status, etc.). Must be a JSON object <= 4096 bytes when serialized, with depth <= 5 levels.

accessPolicy.description: Optional access policy for private attestations. Supports { type: 'did-allowlist', dids: string[] } or { type: 'community-member', communityDid: string }.

commitment.description: SHA-256 commitment hash. Returned only for private attestations.
